about.seoDesc: Sirver A.Ş. brings its extensive experience from the construction sector to the biomass energy industry, providing sustainable and high-capacity raw material supply.
about.intro: Sirver A.Ş. is a next-generation supply company that combines quarter-century operational discipline from the construction sector with the demands of the modern energy industry.

story.title: From Construction to Energy
story.p1: Our company has successfully completed large-scale infrastructure and construction projects across Turkey for many years. The "logistics management in challenging field conditions" competency we gained during this process is our greatest strength that sets us apart from competitors.
story.p2: Biomass energy is not just a raw material supply, but also a serious logistics operation. We deliver thousands of tons of products your factory needs with construction-site discipline, on a just-in-time (JIT) basis.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To reduce industrialists' energy costs and carbon footprint by bringing Turkey's domestic biomass resources into the economy.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To become the region's leading energy supplier, serving at European standards with its technological infrastructure and sustainable production models.

hr.title: Human Resources
hr.desc: Working with the zero-defect principle with an expert and dynamic team that puts occupational safety (OHS) above everything.

products.seoDesc: Technical specifications of G30 and G50 standard, high-calorie, low-moisture industrial wood chips.
products.subtitle: Premium fuel specially processed, dried, and screened for industrial boilers and biomass power plants.
products.sectionDesc: Wood chips produced at Sirver A.Ş. facilities are not simple forest waste. Logs are processed through industrial chippers to achieve uniform sizes and de-dusted in screening units.
features: Low Ash Content (<1.0%) - Extends boiler life.
Optimized Moisture (20-30%) - Improves combustion efficiency.
Uniform Size - Prevents clogging in feeding systems.
Stone and Metal Free - Safe usage.
products.specsSubtitle: Analysis Values According to ISO 17225-4 Standard

usageCards.title: Biomass Power Plants
usageCards.desc: High-tonnage, uninterrupted, and standardized fuel supply for BES power generation facilities.

usageCards.title: Industrial Boilers
usageCards.desc: As a substitute for coal/natural gas in steam boilers of textile, food, and paper factories.

usageCards.title: Landscaping & Agriculture
usageCards.desc: Used as mulching material to preserve soil moisture and as organic fertilizer base.

servicesPage.seoDesc: Our forest waste management, wood chip, and agricultural biomass (corn stalk) baling services.
servicesPage.subtitle: We utilize Turkey's biomass potential at full capacity. We convert both forest and field waste into energy.

forestryServices.title: Industrial Wood Chips
forestryServices.desc: High-standard raw material supply for particleboard (MDF) and paper industry.

forestryServices.title: Forest Industry Waste
forestryServices.desc: Recovery of production residues and branches from forest areas for the economy.

agriculturalServices.title: Corn Stalk Bales
agriculturalServices.desc: High-fiber, economical corn stalk bales for biomass power plants and livestock.

agriculturalServices.title: Agricultural Biomass
agriculturalServices.desc: Conversion of sunflower stalks, canola, and other field waste into energy.

commonServices.title: Biomass Energy Fuel
commonServices.desc: Both forest and agricultural sourced, blended or pure fuel suitable for industrial boilers.

commonServices.title: Logistics Solutions
commonServices.desc: JIT (Just-In-Time) delivery from field/forest to your factory for all product groups.

serviceDetail.stockText: We have seasonal stocks for agricultural products and year-round production for forest products. Please call for current tonnage.

odun-cipsi.title: Industrial Wood Chips
odun-cipsi.desc: High-quality raw material produced in ISO 17225-4 standards with preserved fiber structure for MDF, Particleboard, and Paper industry.
features: Fully Automatic Chipping Line: Logs are processed without manual handling.
Uniform Sizing: Our screening system minimizes dust ratio.
Fiber Quality: Blade angles are set to preserve fiber structure.
Stock Capacity: Uninterrupted supply with 50,000 Ton instant stock.

process.title: Raw Material Acceptance
process.text: Moisture and diameter control of logs from the forest.

process.title: Debarking
process.text: Separation of tree bark for fiber quality.

process.title: Chipping
process.text: Processing to desired size in industrial chipping machines.

process.title: Screening & Sorting
process.text: Separation of dust and oversized particles, standard size guarantee.

biyokutle-yakiti.title: Biomass Energy Fuel
biyokutle-yakiti.desc: High-calorie and carbon-neutral energy source as an alternative to fossil fuels for power plants (BES) and industrial boilers.
features: High Efficiency: Increases boiler efficiency by 15% thanks to low moisture content.
Low Emission: Sulfur and nitrogen oxide emissions are minimal.
Economical: Up to 40% cost advantage compared to natural gas and imported coal.
Domestic Source: Price stability less affected by currency fluctuations.

process.title: Source Collection
process.text: Collection of forest waste and agricultural biomass.

process.title: Natural Drying
process.text: Open-air circulation to reduce moisture content.

process.title: Grinding
process.text: Processing to particle size suitable for combustion system.

process.title: Energy Analysis
process.text: Laboratory confirmation of calorie and moisture values.

orman-atiklari.title: Forest Industry Waste
orman-atiklari.desc: Collection of branches, roots, and production residues remaining in forest areas for economic use and reduction of forest fire risk.
features: Fire Prevention: Removal of combustible material from the forest.
Soil Improvement: Preparing the area for new sapling planting.
Zero Waste: Converting abandoned value in nature into energy.
Mobile Operation: Working in rough terrain with self-propelled machines.

process.title: Site Survey
process.text: Analysis of waste density and terrain structure.

process.title: Collection
process.text: Accumulation of waste with excavator and forwarder.

process.title: Mobile Chipping
process.text: Chipping on-site to reduce volume.

process.title: Transport
process.text: Direct shipment to facility or power plant.

lojistik.title: Logistics Solutions
lojistik.desc: We sell not just products, but time management. JIT delivery throughout Turkey with Walking Floor technology.
features: Quick Unloading: Horizontal unloading system without raising the dump (OHS Friendly).
Maximum Volume: 30% more cargo capacity compared to standard trucks.
In-Factory Management: We take over management of your raw material yard.
Flexible Route: Vehicle fleet compatible from forest roads to highways.

process.title: Planning
process.text: Shipment schedule according to customer production plan.

process.title: Loading
process.text: Precision weighing and moisture control at the weighbridge.

process.title: Live Tracking
process.text: Real-time sharing of vehicle location.

process.title: Delivery
process.text: Automatic unloading at the factory site.

misir-sapi.title: Corn Stalk Bales
misir-sapi.desc: High-compression square bales with high fiber and low moisture content for biomass power plants and livestock industry.
features: High Compression: Dense baling that reduces transportation costs.
Low Moisture: Post-harvest natural sun-drying process in the field.
Multi-Purpose: Used as both fuel (biomass) and animal feed/bedding.
Large Stock: Year-round supply guarantee with seasonal production.

process.title: Post-Harvest
process.text: Windrowing stalks in the field after grain corn harvest.

process.title: Natural Drying
process.text: Stalks reaching ideal moisture level under the sun.

process.title: Baling
process.text: Tight square bale production with high-capacity machines.

process.title: Storage & Dispatch
process.text: Storage in rain-protected areas and transportation.

tarimsal-biyokutle.title: Agricultural Biomass
tarimsal-biyokutle.desc: Collection and conversion of field waste such as sunflower stalks, canola, cotton stalks, and rice husks into clean energy source.
features: Waste Management: Utilization of waste left and abandoned to decay in the field.
Economical Fuel: Lower cost alternative compared to wood chips.
Carbon Neutral: Supports carbon cycle due to its plant-based origin.
Flexible Use: Raw material blends suitable for different boiler types.

process.title: Site Analysis
process.text: Determining waste potential based on regional agricultural products.

process.title: Collection
process.text: Collecting stalks remaining after combine harvest.

process.title: Processing
process.text: Crushing or baling process if necessary.

process.title: Supply
process.text: Direct raw material flow to energy facilities.

sustainability.seoDesc: Working towards a carbon-neutral future. Sustainable forest management and clean energy chain.
sustainability.heroTitle:
WE GIVE BACK TO NATURE 
 WHAT WE TAKE
sustainability.heroDesc: We don't just produce energy; we balance the carbon cycle by bringing idle forest waste into the economy.
sustainability.step1Text: Thinning and maintenance work required for forest health under the control of the General Directorate of Forestry.
sustainability.step2Text: Collection of branches and waste remaining on the forest floor that pose a fire risk.
sustainability.step3Text: Chipping collected waste and using it as a substitute for fossil fuels.
sustainability.carbonDesc: Biomass releases the carbon it absorbed while growing.
